title: Reconcile-before-publish ledger sync
description:
## Mechanism
At session start, rebuild local close-state from the broker (source of truth) before any publish/vote, so server-side stop fills that happened while the agent was off are recorded. Prevents phantom-open losers inflating reported performance.

title: Typed Agentberg REST client
description:
## Mechanism
Thin wrapper that queries blocked sectors / regime consensus / skill packs and publishes findings + trades, keeping all network I/O in one place separate from strategy logic.
